reviews.comment:
Me descontó 1000 puntos de la serviclub no se para que, envés de sumarme la carga de combustible, por suerte guarde el tiquet ojo controlen la serviclub, segunda vez que me lo hacen, AMPLIO Y MODIFICO OPINION, pase LES MOSTRE EL TIQUET PARA QUE ME DEN UNA EXPLICACION,  y se isieron los dolobu, a no sabían quién me atendió, tampoco me dieron una solución o respuesta alguna. No sé relajen, controlen los tiquet, que les facturan, que dice el surtidor, lamentablemente no se puede disfrutar. Espero me Allan solo garcado puntos serviclub, porque nunca controlaba ahora lamentablemente 20.000 ojos con esta estación de servicio en particular

(Translated by Google)
They deducted 1000 Serviclub points from my account, I don't know why, instead of adding the fuel cost. Luckily, I kept the receipt. Be careful with Serviclub; this is the second time they've done this to me. I'm expanding and modifying my opinion. I went in and showed them the receipt so they could give me an explanation, and they acted like they didn't know who served me. They didn't give me any solution or answer either. Don't get complacent, check your receipts, what they're charging you, what the pump says. Unfortunately, you can't enjoy it. I hope they only ripped me off with Serviclub points because I never used to check before, and now, unfortunately, I've lost 20,000. Be careful with this particular gas station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12844074835254669240/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBekpHT3l3RRAB
